description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that uses the asciidoctor/docker-asciidoctor:latest Docker image and defines a single build stage. Add a build job (named build) that runs in the build stage, executes the command ./build -g && ./build -pekdf book.adoc, and after the script runs echo "End CI". The job is limited to the master branch (only: master) and publishes artifacts including book.pdf, book.epub, book.html, book.xml, book-kf8.epub, book.mobi, images/icons/*, images/*, and preview.html, with an expiration of 1 week.
